can-you-ensure-all-test-20260411.goal: Ensure all benchmark test cases in benchmark/cases/f1040/2025/ are correct — inputs and expected outputs represent accurate 2025 tax year 1040 calculations.
engine_bugs_for_tax_fix: CRITICAL: form8962 PTC uses wrong applicable % table (permanent indexed vs ARP/IRA enhanced) — cases 36,52,110
MEDIUM: EITC income limits config too low (e.g., 0 children: 18591 vs IRS 19104)
MEDIUM: Saver's Credit AGI thresholds use 2024 values not 2025
MEDIUM: OBBB senior deduction ($6000 Schedule 1-A) not implemented — case 09
LOW: PTC repayment caps use prior-year values

HIGH: SSA provisional income wrongly subtracts student loan interest deduction — case 25
HIGH: OBBBA $6,000/person senior deduction not implemented — cases 09,124
HIGH: NIIT missing for case 76 (AGI $502k MFJ, NII $5,583)
MEDIUM: Withholding aggregation overcounts by $792 in K-1 cases — case 82
LOW: Case 45 PTC value $2,072 may be wrong (cannot reproduce from Rev Proc 2025-15)
pre_existing_engine_failures: Case 31: HSA node producing wrong values
Case 86: SALT cap / itemized deduction mismatch
